Cosmetic & Implant Dentistry

It’s not about the teeth.It’s about the life yoursmile lets you live.

Dr. Trevor J. Thomas crafts life-changing smiles for real people with real stories — blending artistry, precision, and a little soul into every transformation.

Book Your ConsultationView Smile Gallery
Scroll

01The Philosophy

Dentistry is my ministry.

For Dr. Trev, a smile is a gateway — to confidence, to better mental health, to a fuller life. Every case begins not with a tooth, but with a person and the story they carry.

That belief has shaped a practice where world-class craftsmanship meets genuine care. The result is work that looks effortless and feels like coming home to yourself.

Real people. Real problems. Real results.

Dr. TrevDr. Trevor Thomas, DDS
“

In His Words

A smile isn't cosmetic. It's the first thing you give the world and the last thing you forget about yourself. My work is to give people back something they thought was gone for good.
Dr. Trevor J. Thomas, DDS
0+
Years in Practice
0
Cities Served
0+
Smiles Transformed
0%
Care, Every Visit

02The Craft

Signature services, executed as artistry.

01

Smile Makeovers

A fully bespoke redesign of your smile — proportion, shade, and character tailored to your face and personality.

→
02

Porcelain Veneers

Hand-finished ceramic artistry that corrects shape, color, and alignment with natural, light-catching translucency.

→
03

Dental Implants

Permanent, lifelike tooth replacement — engineered for function and finished for beauty.

→
04

Full-Mouth Rehabilitation

Complex, life-restoring reconstruction that rebuilds health, bite, and confidence from the ground up.

→
✦

03The Smile Gallery

Transformations, not just teeth.

Start your story
After
Before

Drag to reveal the transformation

04Trusted By

The dentist the stars come to.

Star of SMILE: LA, and the Hollywood smile behind some of music and entertainment's most recognizable faces — designed with the same care given to every patient who sits in the chair.

As Seen On

  • SMILE: LA
  • Zeus Network
  • TMZ
  • Yahoo
  • Black Enterprise
  • The Source
  • AllHipHop
  • HotNewHipHop
  • The Hype Magazine
  • Respect Magazine

04The Experience

Three steps to the smile that's always been yours.

I

The Consultation

We listen first. Your goals, your history, your story — mapped into a clear, honest plan with no surprises.

II

The Design

Your new smile is sculpted digitally and previewed before a single procedure — designed around your face, not a template.

III

The Reveal

Precision execution, hand-finished detail, and the moment you see yourself fully — often for the very first time.

The Standard

Every detail is considered. Every result is earned. Nothing about your smile is left to chance.

05Smile Now, Pay Later

A world-class smile shouldn't wait for the perfect moment.

We believe transformation should be within reach. Flexible financing and monthly payment plans make life-changing dentistry accessible — so you can begin today and pay over time.

Explore Financing Options

Plans from $0 down

Begin your transformation today with low monthly payments tailored to your budget — no large upfront cost.

Apply in minutes

A simple, soft credit check gets you an answer fast — without affecting your score or interrupting your day.

Care that fits your life

Stretch your investment across comfortable terms so the smile you deserve never has to wait for the perfect moment.

Begin

Book your consultation.

Tell us a little about your smile and what you'd love to change. Texting is the fastest way to reach the team.

Text / Call
